title: Deploy (Nested Steps)
expectation: Use the manager project repository as the integration, release, deploy, and live-validation surface for this process. If a worker-hosted feature branch is the source of truth, first confirm that a focused feature branch exists, then pull the changes back into the manager project repository before continuing. Follow the deploy process through manager-side branch integration, release promotion, runtime deploy, runtime revision and version verification, live health verification, issuance of a manager-dashboard session URL with `bun run issue:dashboard-session`, real browser verification at the public Cloudflare manager dashboard URL using that issued session URL, manager-dashboard screenshot verification, cleanup of the feature branch and worktree on success, and rollback recovery when screenshot verification fails.
idlePrompt: If deployment is complete, reply only with 'done: deploy complete'. If you are truly blocked on a missing focused feature branch, user decision, or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: deploy blocked'. Otherwise resume the deploy process immediately and perform the next required integration, release, deploy, cleanup, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on focused feature branch, user decision, or environment dependency

steps.title: Is there a focused feature branch?

decision.prompt: Is there a focused feature branch?

steps.title: Pull the changes from the focused worker feature branch back to the project repo on the manager
Clean up the feature branch and worktree
